_comment: Stage-2 boxed-rescue config. Generic — the rescue_notebook.ipynb at repo root reads this. To rescue a different upstream experiment, change source_experiment + stage1_dataset_name and re-run.
notes: Stage-2 model: base Qwen3-Thinking-2507 (not GRPO — generalizes to any upstream experiment). T=0.1 = near-deterministic extraction. max_tokens=2048 gives thinking model room to think before emitting boxed answer. Rescue candidates = responses with no \boxed substring anywhere (matches analyze.py's missing_boxed bucket).
